title: Marketing Manager B2B (m/w/d) – Growth & Performance
summary: Early-stage B2B growth marketing role focused on hands-on SEO/SEA/HubSpot execution; candidate's analytical background partially fits but lacks key technical channels, HubSpot proficiency, and native-level German.
key_requirements: Nachweisbare B2B Growth Marketing-Erfahrung (SaaS, RegTech, HR-Tech)
Hands-on SEO, SEA & Paid Social – selbst aufsetzen und optimieren
Performance-Denken in CAC, LTV und Pipeline
HubSpot als Daily Tool (Daily Driver, kein Onboarding-Projekt)
GEO / AI Search Expertise (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini)
Deutsch auf Muttersprachniveau & Englisch sicher in Wort und Schrift
matched_skills: B2B marketing experience (Intelligent Power Corporation, GRG Banking – product launches, trade fairs)
missing_skills: Hands-on SEO / SEA / Google Ads execution
Paid Social campaign management (Meta, LinkedIn Ads)
German at native / C2 level (candidate: B1+)
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B campaign ROI results (4.6M CNY contract revenue, qualified lead rate improvement)
Emphasise full-funnel thinking: lead magnets → conversion → revenue attribution
Showcase competitive intelligence and go-to-market strategy support as proxy for growth marketing mindset
Position Power BI dashboards as performance-measurement capability transferable to CAC/LTV tracking
Mention any SEO/content exposure, even if indirect
language_requirement: Deutsch Muttersprachniveau + Englisch – candidate's German B1+ is a critical gap
location_notes: Hamburg hybrid/remote – candidate is based in Lüneburg, feasible for hybrid
risk_flags: German language level (B1+) well below required native level – likely disqualifying
No HubSpot experience listed – core daily tool for the role
No hands-on SEO/SEA/Paid Social execution experience evidenced
No SaaS or startup background – role is first marketing hire at early-stage company
Company size 1–10 employees – very high ambiguity and autonomy required
